settings.gg5NIehPUZF_text: Korean Skincare Glow White Hunt: Terms & Conditions
settings.ggfNP0mWXe7_text:
1. General Information

The Hunt is only available on the following Korean Skincare online stores:

  • koreanskincare.com
  • koreanskincare.nl
  • korean-skincare.de
  • koreanskincare.co.uk

A limited number of discount codes are available for redemption. Find the discount code hidden on the online Korean Skincare store from Wednesday, March 26, 2025 (18:00 GMT until 20:00 GMT) and redeem it to get 10%, 20%, 30%, or 50% off a new order! (T&C apply, see below).

 

2. How to Redeem a Discount Code

To use a discount code, follow these steps:

a. Visit one of the Korean Skincare online stores listed above. 
b. Add item(s) to your shopping basket. 
c. Proceed to checkout. 
d. Enter the discount code in the designated box and click ‘Apply.’ 
e. Complete the payment for your order.

 

3. Discount Code Conditions

  1. Discount codes are subject to availability and must be redeemed on an order placed on the online Korean Skincare store where the code was found between Wednesday, March 26, 2025 (18:00 GMT till 20:00 GMT).
  2. Only one discount code can be applied per order.
  3. Codes are limited to one use per customer.
  4. Maximum of 20 items per order and a maximum order value of 330 Pounds Sterling apply. Orders exceeding these limits will be canceled.
  5. Discount codes cannot be combined with any other voucher, promotional, or discount codes.
  6. Discount codes are not available for Korean Skincare staff or employees of its group companies.
  7. Discount codes do not apply to delivery charges. Please check delivery terms and conditions online.
  8. Orders and free gifts are subject to stock availability. No cash alternative is offered.
  9. By redeeming a discount code, you agree to be bound by Korean Skincare's Terms and Conditions of Sale.
  10. Refunds will reflect the discount applied. The discount will be proportionally spread across the items purchased and will not apply to any replacements.
  11. Korean Skincare reserves the right to decline orders if a discount code is deemed invalid or linked to fraudulent activity.
  12. Korean Skincare reserves the right to change these Terms and Conditions or withdraw the promotion at any time with reasonable notice.
  13. These terms and conditions are governed by the laws of The Netherlands.

4. Discount Code Availability

  • 10% discount = 495 redemptions available
  • 20% discount = 300 redemptions available
  • 30% discount = 60 redemptions available
  • 50% discount = 6 redemptions available

Breakdown of Code Usage:

  • 10% Discount: 15 different codes, each usable 33 times
  • 20% Discount: 10 different codes, each usable 30 times
  • 30% Discount: 5 different codes, each usable 12 times
  • 50% Discount: 2 different codes, each usable 3 times

5. Apple Potion Codes

  • 1 Apple Potion Code = 1 free Melixir 'Vegan Lip Butter (Shade: #03 Red Velvet)'
  • 10 codes available, each code is redeemable 3 times
  • Apple Potion Codes cannot be combined with other discount codes.

6. The KS Gift Card (Golden Envelope)

  1. The KS Gift Card is valid for six months from April 1, 2025 – September 30, 2025.
  2. The KS Gift Card can be used only once.

7. Free Gifts

  1. Free gifted products may differ depending on availability.
  2. The Hunt free gifts don't apply to app purchases.

For any questions regarding the Hunt Event, please refer to our Customer Service team. Happy hunting!

Fair folks, the 5th edition of the Korean Skincare Hunt, The Glow White Hunt, has now ended!
Glow White & the KS Team thank you from the bottom of our hearts for participating! We hope your Hunt was successful and filled with discounts & free gifts. To satisfy your curiosity, let us reveal the secret hints we had scattered everywhere, as well as the location of our most-coveted discounts.

settings.ggm_LedtXyK_text:
Once upon a time there lived a princess, with glowing skin white as milk, hair black as ebony and blood-red lips, and her name was Glow White. The Evil Queen that had replaced her beloved mother was cruel and envied her pure glow, as she sought to keep youth and beauty to herself with her elixirs.

Shaken to her core by the Evil Queen's cruelty, Glow White put on her red velvet cloak and fled the castle she once called home without saying good bye.

As she wandered through the mossy trees, the spring sun warmed the earth and the air was filled with the scent of peach blossoms. She picked a red flower, and birds fluttered close, so she fed them the bean seeds she kept in her pocket.

Lost but unafraid, she stumbled upon a charming cottage nestled beside a thriving pumpkin patch. The door opened to welcome her, and within she found the most loyal friends. In their care, she learned that the miracle light of kindness could shine even in the darkest of shadows.

But the Queen’s jealousy was relentless, she could not stand that the elixirs that made her glow were shared with the kingdom, their magic no longer hers alone. Disguised, she came bearing a poisoned gift. One bite, and Glow White fell into an enchanted slumber, until a prince’s gentle kiss awakened her.
